subtitle.ja: 右手で糸を持ち、左手首に4~5回巻き付けます
subtitle.en: With the right hand, grasp the string and wind it around the left wrist four or five times.

subtitle.ja: 左手のひらに2回糸を巻き付け、左手の甲の2本の糸を右手で握り、手を左右に離します
subtitle.en: Wind the string twice around the left palm, then grasp the two strings across the back of the left hand with the right hand and pull the hands apart.

subtitle.ja: 左手首に巻いている糸を1本取り、両手の間に移します
subtitle.en: Take one of the strings wound around the left wrist and carry it between the hands.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、左手首に巻いている糸を全て両手の間に移します
subtitle.en: In the same way, transfer all the remaining strings wound around the left wrist to between the hands.

subtitle.ja: 握った両手の親指側にある2本の糸の間に親指と人差し指を入れ、2本の糸の間隔を広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Insert the thumbs and index fingers between the two strings on the thumb side of the grasped hands, spread the strings apart, and this completes the figure.
